programme.title: Man Of The Year
programme.desc: Tom Dobbs (Robin Williams), the satirical host of a political talk show, decides to shake things up by running for president after making comments that he would be a better president than the leader who currently occupies the White House. His fans begin a grassroots campaign that catapults him into the Oval Office, but soon after moving in it is revealed a computer glitch mistakenly awarded him the presidency. Tom is left with a tough choice, stay the course or head back behind the microphone.

programme.title: A Dark Place
programme.desc: When a young boy goes missing in a sleepy backwoods town, a local sanitation truck driver, Donald, plays detective, embarking on a precarious and obsessive investigation.

programme.title: The Family Holiday
programme.desc: A thirty-something pool hustler stands to receive a ten-million dollar inheritance if he can prove he's forsaken his street days and settled down with a family.

programme.title: Her Minor Thing
programme.desc: Jeana's (Estella Warren) boyfriend, Tom (Michael Weatherly), a television news reporter, is increasingly frustrated with her unwillingness to hop in the sack. One day, unaware that he's on the air, he tells his audience he's dating a virgin. Jeana is mortified by Tom's admission, and she immediately finds that she's targeted by randy local men who want to sleep with her. Most of the guys are jerks. But, when she meets a photographer named Paul (Christian Kane), her faith in men is restored.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Seconds to Spare
programme.desc: An assassin hijacks a passenger train and threatens to detonate enough poison to wipe out an entire city. While the cops attempt to thwart his ransom, they call in former DEA agent Paul Blake - the one man who may be able to stop the deadly plot.

programme.title: Halo 4: Forward Unto Dawn
programme.desc: UNSC Cadet Thomas Lasky must conquer his inner fears and join forces with super-soldier John-117 to take down a massive faction of the Covenant.

programme.title: Coup de foudre sucré salé
programme.desc: Une critique de restaurant doit se faire passer pour la cuisinière du chef qu'elle a insulté pour faire amende honorable.

programme.title: Dix jours pour changer de vie
programme.desc: Deux sœurs qui sont exaspérées par leurs vies amoureuses et professionnelles acceptent d'échanger leurs maisons pendant deux semaines.

programme.title: La course au mariage
programme.desc: Un couple qui n'arrive pas à se décider sur le thème de son mariage engage deux organisateurs, Taylor et Ben, qui se disputent le poste.

programme.title: L'amour en miniature
programme.desc: Lorsque le père d'Olivia, modéliste, s'apprête à prendre sa retraite, elle pense qu'elle est la personne toute désignée pour le remplacer.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: The Prince is dismayed to learn that his uncle has usurped the throne.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: A fun-loving, self-made man forgoes marrying a straight-laced heiress for her black sheep sister.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: A million dollar Tycoon hires a tutor to teach his lover proper etiquette.

programme.title: Pal Joey
programme.desc: A singer must choose between a socialite who can help his career and the chorus girl who's stolen his heart.

programme.title: The Infiltrator
programme.desc: In 1986, federal agent Robert Mazur (Bryan Cranston) goes under cover to infiltrate the trafficking network of Colombian drug kingpin Pablo Escobar. Working with fellow agents Kathy Ertz (Diane Kruger) and Emir Abreu (John Leguizamo), Mazur poses as a slick, money-laundering businessman named Bob Musella. Gaining the confidence of Roberto Alcaino (Benjamin Bratt), Escobar's top lieutenant, Mazur must navigate a vicious criminal underworld where one wrong move could cost him everything.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Moments in Spacetime
programme.desc: A woman must care for her grandfather who is suffering from dementia.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: "If we had more police, they wouldn't be able to get away with it so easily,” says convenience store owner.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: We see the effects of a changing Britain three years after Brexit, a political event that divided the nation.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: A member of the public has reported seeing a tiny boat unload an unusual cargo into an awaiting Luton van.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: This is the story of two very different manhunts.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: The force's Control Rooms must deal with over a thousand incidents a day with a crew of frontline officers.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: This episode highlights the extraordinary pressure the Devon & Cornwall police are under.

programme.title: Call The Cops
programme.desc: Since 2017 Devon and Cornwall Police are dealing with over 18,000 extra 999 calls.

programme.title: Wet Dream
programme.desc: Jin-hee scarred by loss and loneliness finds healing and true love with a man who cherishes her selflessly.

programme.title: One Win (Dubbed)
programme.desc: With a career win rate below 10%, disgraced former volleyball star Woo-jin coaches a collapsing women's pro team, chasing a single impossible win for a massive reward.

programme.title: 4:44 : Time Of Fear
programme.desc: Missing persons. Eerie sounds. Shadows at night. Bukchon Apartment hides more than secrets.

programme.title: The Thieves (Dubbed)
programme.desc: Master thieves target a casino's $20M diamond, facing vaults, cops, and betrayals for the ultimate score.

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Young-min, in order to get money for his sick daughter's surgery, carries out a hit against his gang member Heo-gang. But when his boss Bae-san refuses to pay him for the hit, Young-min murders his boss. Soon, the police try to arrest him, but Doo-hyun, aka the legendary goblin, takes the blame instead. Released after 10 years, Doo-hyun seeks out the detective who ruined his life, and hears that Young-min has taken his place as the goblin…

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story."Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major,

programme.title: Apache Territory
programme.desc: A drifter takes on marauding Apaches in order to save a group of besieged settlers.

programme.title: Massacre Canyon
programme.desc: A man has to lead a wagon train carrying rifles through hostile Indian territory.

programme.title: Jack McCall, Desperado
programme.desc: A Southerner fighting for the North is unjustly accused of treason and escapes to clear his name.

programme.title: Lust For Gold

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.12

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.22
programme.desc: When King Seonjo selects Yukdo's lid, Yukdo struggles to contain his joy, while Jeongi graciously acknowledges his skill. Seizing the moment, Inbin plots to frame Gwanghae for treason by forging his letter. As Jeongi departs on Gangcheon's errand to mine white clay, Gwanghae mounts his horse and races after her.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.23
programme.desc: Upon returning to the palace, Gwanghae insists that the letter King Seonjo presents to him has been forged—but the king refuses to believe it. Jeongi is shaken when Imhae warns her that anyone tied to the alleged treason will not escape unscathed. When Jeongi meets Gwanghae, she vows to restrain even her own feelings so as not to become a burden to him. Court Lady Gukbi is stunned to learn that Jeongi is Yeonok's daughter.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.24
programme.desc: After uncovering the full truth, Jeongi begins searching for a way to bring about Gangcheon's downfall, with Taedo pledging to help her. When Jeongi and Gwanghae cross paths at the Bunwon, they share a tender, wordless gaze filled with longing. Upon discovering a ledger detailing Gangcheon's bribes, Jeongi resolves to win Royal Consort Inbin's favor. Meanwhile, Hwa-ryeong decides to eliminate Son Haengsu.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.25
programme.desc: Leaving her audience with Inbin, Jeongi runs into Gangcheon and Yukdo at the palace. When King Seonjo refers to Euldam as a traitor, Jeongi is left on edge. Together with Taedo, she devises a plan to ensnare Gangcheon. Later, Gwanghae returns the bowl Jeongi once gave to Son Haengsu. Impressed by Jeongi's skill, Inbin requests that if Jeongi crafts a medicine bowl that fully satisfies Prince Shinseong, she be officially appointed a master potter.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.26
programme.desc: As Jeongi and Yukdo face off in a decisive competition, all eyes at the Bunwon are fixed on the outcome. Thrilled at the prospect of becoming nangcheong, Yukdo is confident of victory. Jeongi asks Hwa-ryeong to procure the white clay needed for the contest, while Hwa-ryeong urges Yukdo to defeat Jeongi at all costs. When the medicine bowls are completed, Jeongi and Yukdo anxiously await Prince Shinseong's judgment—until the prince suddenly collapses after drinking from the bowl.

programme.title: Goddess of Fire Ep.27
programme.desc: Jeongi confronts Gangcheon, demanding that he reveal the truth about Euldam, but his shameless willingness to offer a false confession only fuels her anger. Gwanghae vows before King Seonjo to uncover not only the truth behind the current 사건 but also the events of the previous nangcheong competition. A royal order is issued for Yukdo's execution, and a grief-stricken Gangcheon kneels before the palace gates in penitence.

programme.desc: Oh Ji Young, having failed to place, cannot hide her disappointment, and Hyung Joon feels sorry for her. Director Yang, having learned all the facts, proposes to Ji Young that she leave Hyung Joon and join him to compete in the main competition after Im Sun Joo steps down.

Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong, but when Carlos reveals Froy's true whereabouts tempers ..

And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.title: Crunch Time

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt

Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. programme.title: Departures S02 E07
programme.desc: The guys stay with the Tsatsaan Reindeer tribe for a couple more days before the long trek back to Ulaan Bator. Scott and Justin stop along the way at a complete strangers ger (traditional Mongolian tent) where the three are invited in for fermented yaks-milk and some mix of goat-organ soup. Craving adventure of a different variety, they rent ATV's and drive freely into the Gobi desert. Camping at night, and driving by day, the trio discover the ultimate idea of freedom, before running into various trouble on the road.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E02

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E03
programme.desc: Antarctica was once the centre of the ancient southern supercontinent, Gondwana. Traces of these connections remain throughout the southern hemisphere today: in plants and marine species with similarities that have long-ago changed and adapted to the environment around them.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E04
programme.desc: When it's time to haul ashore for breeding, mating and raising young, marine mammals return from the Antarctic Peninsula to island beaches in the middle of the South Atlantic oceans.

programme.sub-title: Bear With Seal: Alaska Bear Hunt Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella will take Navy SEAL Rorke Denver on his first hunt deep into the Alaskan backcountry to search for black bears in the mighty Alaska Range. In the remote wilderness, two friends will look into the differences and similarities between the hunter and the warrior. The bears are out but Rorke and Steve will have to work hard to put a tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaska's Brooks Range, Steven Rinella and wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell have ten days of hunting before the plane returns. Big-antlered Yukon moose are few and far between but hard work pays off for hunters who stick with it until the bitter end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Yukon Giants: Northern Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Dropped off by bushplane on a remote lakeside in the wilderness of Alaskas Brooks Range.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Jungle: Adventures in Bolivia Part 1
programme.desc: Steve is fascinated by indigenous people who live in the wilds South America. In this three-part series, he travels deep into the Amazon jungle to hunt with and learn from the locals there. Not only will this be one heck of a hunting adventure, it will be a mind-opening, life-changing event. From bowfishing to hunting in the jungle at night, you never know what the evening's menu will bring.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: Erica Rhodes
programme.desc: Erica Rhodes is a regular panelist on Comedy Central's @midnight and Fox's Punchline. She has made appearances on SeeSo's The Guest List, Hulu's Coming to the Stage, AXS' Live at Gotham and the syndicated Comics Unleashed. Erica has performed at San Francisco Sketchfest, the Moontower Comedy Festival (Austin, TX), the Blue Whale Comedy Festival (Tulsa, OK), the Boston Comedy Festival and RIOT LA Fest. Recent TV credits include ABC's Modern Family, HBO's Veep, Fox's New Girl, and IFC's Comedy Bang Bang. Erica stars in Audible's Dr. Katz: The Audio Files and ABC Digital's The Off Season. She recurs on TruTV's Fameless and has been a semi-regular performer/writer on NPR's A Prairie Home Companion.

programme.title: Andrew Sleighter
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Kortney Shane Williams
programme.desc: The master of satire has been a part of The Bridgetown Comedy Festival, Boston Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull Comedy Festival, and Bumbershoot Arts festival. Kortney's self-deprecating humor has won him finalist spots in both Comedy Central's South Beach Comedy Festival Competition and NBC's Stand-Up Showcase.

programme.title: Goumba Johnny Sialiano: Comedy in COVID
programme.desc: Goumba Johnny Sialino recaps the chaos and comedy of quarantine.

programme.title: Nick Cobb
programme.desc: Hailing from Memphis, TN, Nick Cobb attended Indiana University where he majored in Psychology and learned to obsess over meaningless nonsense. This led him to work in his first comedy club, aptly named “The Looney Bin.” It was at a tiny Beale Street bar where Nick won a stand-up competition, was bitten by the comedy bug and moved to New York to pursue The Dream. While in New York, Nick was seen on Comedy Central's Live at Gotham, VH1's Morning Buzz, AMC's Date Night as well as on NBC's “Last Comic Standing” where he not only earned a spot in the semi-finals, but was also featured in a montage of comics recognized for having highly original material. Less than a year ago, Nick took his talents to Los Angeles. Since moving out West he won the March Madness Competition at the Hollywood Improv, appeared on Comedy Central's Inside Amy Schumer, and had his late night debut on The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson. He also recently performed on AXS's Gotham Comedy Live. He also played the lead in the espn.com comedic web series “Team Players,” and has been seen in many commercials including Pepsi Max, Asthma.com, Joe's Crab Shack, Carmax and starred in an e-Trade spot during halftime of the Super Bowl! When not performing standup, Nick is brooding over that one guy in the crowd who was texting during his act.

programme.title: Landry: Hair Chronicles
programme.desc: Landry's energy is contagious. Coming to the Dry Bar stage with a fresh, bold take on common tropes, he describes the difference between first-class passengers and everyone else a DUI and an IUD and Cracker Barrel versus any yard sale.

programme.title: Scott Losse
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.title: Will C.
programme.desc: Will C. tells his incredible, inspirational, and hilarious life story, from serving in three separate branches of the military to filming a music video with Kanye West.

programme.title: Mike Paramore
programme.desc: Flirtatious and genuinely “glad to be here,” Mike Paramore talks space force, avoiding Bobs, having too many questions, and face-to-face catfishing.

programme.title: Dylan Mandlsohn
programme.desc: Dylan Mandlsohn's special is full of travel stories and riffs on America through the eyes of a Canadian.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9? tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years ago a lump appeared on his right thigh. It's not visible from the stage but according to some kids at the water park, it looks creepy. Many people say Bengt looks kind of like a monkey. Bengt Washburn was born in Salt Lake City, Utah but grew up in a large Utah town (1,200 people) as the fifth child in a small Mormon family (7 children). Bengt is married to an officer in the United States Airforce. They have lived in 6 different cities over the last eleven years. Most recently he moved to Springfield, Virginia (Washington D.C.) after living in Stuttgart, Germany for 3 years. Bengt is a former winner of the prestigious San Francisco International Comedy Competition. He has been seen on The Late Late Show with Craig Fergusen, Live at Gotham on Comedy Central and most recently Conan on TBS. He was invited to perform at the Vancouver International Comedy Festival, The Boston Comedy Festival, the Aspen Laff Festival and Gilda's Laugh Fest in Grand Rapids, Michigan. He's been heard on NPR, PRI and Bob and Tom. All three of his comedy Cd's can be heard playing on XM Sirius radio. Most people who know him would say Bengt is a logistically impaired ditz, but his comedy is described as intelligent, surprisingly universal considering the content matter and profoundly funny.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss Anjelah Johnson, aka Bon Qui Qui, for a hilarious hour of comedy. See why nearly 100 million YouTube fans have fallen in love as she performs with Jim Mendrinos, Luis J Gomez, Nick Vatterott and Wil Sylvince.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Bobby Lee will have you laughing out loud with a hour of stand-up comedy. Don't miss this rare chance to see the veteran comedian with Jena Kingsley, Frank Spadone, Dan Naturman and Gina Yashere at New York's legendary Gotham Comedy Club.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss this episode starring the unpredictable and outrageous "Saturday Night Live" alum Jim Breuer live from New York's Gotham Comedy Club. Also featuring Jessica Kirson, Jeff Dye, Rich Aronovitch and Isiah Kelly.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: The legendary Jackie Martling will blow you away with a barrage of rapid-fire jokes in this live show from New York's Gotham Comedy Club. Don't miss this hilarious night of comedy along with Andy Pitz, Miguel Dalmau and Charles McBee.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Join Jay Mohr in a rare stand-up appearance live from New York's legendary Gotham Comedy Club. Mohr along with D.C. Benny, James Davis, Harris Stanton and Joe List will leave you begging for more.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: WWE legend Mick Foley takes the stage for the hardest-hitting night of comedy in TV history. Get up close with Mick and four of America's funniest comics from your very own ringside seat for an outrageous hour of stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Tom Cotter hosts an outrageous night of live and uncensored stand-up live from New York's legendary Gotham Comedy Club. Don't miss the comedian Rolling Stone calls "sensational" along with Rob Cantrell, Jess Wood, David Agyekum and Jimmy Failla.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan The Pale Tourist: Canadian American
programme.desc: Jim Gaffigan performs stand-up in Canada and has some very strong opinions on poutine, Saskatchewan, health care, and the pronunciation of the city of Regina. Also, no one prepared him for his first moose encounter and he's quite upset about it.

programme.title: The Big Picture

programme.title: The Rewatchables
programme.desc: Do The Ringer's Bill Simmons, Sean Fennessey, and Amanda Dobbins look like they give a damn if their martini is shaken or stirred? They put on their tuxedos to revisit the first installment in the James Bond–Daniel Craig franchise, Casino Royale, starring Daniel Craig, Mads Mikkelsen, and Eva Green.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Chef David Chang and the members of the Recipe Club sift through millions of recipes to find the very best way to make the food you want to eat (subjectively speaking, of course). From plant-based meat to broccoli to seaweed, Chang and friends are determined to cut through the noise. Each week, they cook one dish, debate it, and ultimately figure out a few ways to make it tastier, too.

programme.title: Book of Basketball 2.0
programme.desc: Bill Simmons is joined by a rotating cast of Ryen Russillo, Chris Ryan, Joe House, Zach Lowe, and Chad Ford to redraft and re-analyze every NBA draft from 1996 to 2010.

programme.title: Jerry Seinfeld

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Appearing before a devastated Usagi is a man who looks just like Mamoru but goes by "Endo". Usagi sees traces of Mamoru and thus approaches him…

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: To end the painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself. The two fall to the ground, and are sucked in by Queen Metalia.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.sub-title: Act.14 CONCLUSION AND COMMENCEMENT - PETITE ÉTRANGERE -
programme.desc: Sailor Moon stands up to destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the \"Legendary Silver Crystal\" is finally released.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky. Meanwhile, at Rei's school where the school fair is taking place, a new enemy has crept in.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: When Rei is abducted, Usagi begins to doubt the identity of Chibi-Usa. Meanwhile, Ami is challenged by a mysterious woman at the World Chess Conference.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions. There, she learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium of the four Spectre Sisters!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the others decide to go to the 30th century, where Chibi-Usa came from. Waiting for them there is the solitary Guardian Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru's future self, King Endymion, appears before Sailor Moon and her friends. He reveals a shocking fact about Planet Earth in the future.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Captured by Dimande, Usagi loses her transformation powers. Meanwhile, Chibi-Usa feels helpless and goes to see Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi tries to escape the Black Moon Castle. She arrives at the \"Malefic Black Crystal\" reactor, where she finds Dimande's younger brother Saphir.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others continue their search for Tuxedo Mask and Chibi-Usa. But Wiseman's covert maneuvers had already begun…

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: As the fierce battles between Chimera Ants and Hunters continue, the King and Komugi continue to play Gungi.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The King is annoyed and confounded after meeting Komugi, the unfathomable Gungi world champion. But at the same time, he is having fun. He proposes a wager with Komugi.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Knov infiltrates the palace, but just as he is about to climb the Central Staircase he is stopped in his tracks by a heavy and ominous aura seeping from the floor above.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Morel has been chased into an underground church by the lion-type Chimera Ant, Leol. Leol activates his Nen Abilities, and Morel begins his counterattack.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and Killua have gained new allies and prepare to charge into battle. Meanwhile, the King and Komugi continue to play Gungi.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.sub-title: Taking Stock x And x Taking Action

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Welfin, a wolf-like Chimera Ant, realizes that someone has infiltrated the palace. With his sharp sense of smell, he tracks down the intruders.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon, Killua, Knuckle, Shoot, Morel and Meleoron have gathered inside Knov's Fourth Dimensional Mansion. The battle between the humans and Chimera Ants is about to begin.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Zeno and Netero's sudden attack throws the palace into confusion. Concerned for the King's safety, Pitou and Pouf hurry to the King's side.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Gon and his friends have charged into the palace. Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel heads for the King.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The King faces off against Netero and Zeno. Zeno releases his Nen aura, Dragon Head, toward the King.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: In the basement of the palace, Ikalgo desperately searches for Palm. Meanwhile, Meleoron has used his Perfect Plan to make Knuckle completely invisible.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Zeno's cryptic words to Killua and Gon becomes clear when they reach the tower.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Ikalgo reads Palm's hidden message, which says that she has gone to the palace and to assume that she is dead if she does not respond before the start of the mission.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish's father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno's incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team's survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: A Little Story From the Past ~My Name Is Doppio~
programme.desc: Bruno and team make an emergency landing in Sardegna where the Hitman Team leader, Risotto, is also determined to uncover a certain mystery. Doppio, a timid, wide-eyed teen, the result of a seemingly impossible pregnancy, has his own goals on the island.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having discovered there is more to skittish Doppio than meets the eye, Risotto uses his Stand to manifest various metallic instruments of torture from within his enemy. Fortunately for Doppio, a way to foresee the inevitable offers a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: Under a Sky That Could Come Falling at Any Moment
programme.desc: A picturesque Sardinian cliff becomes the bloody backdrop to Doppio's sudden dominance over Risotto, courtesy of Narancia's own Stand. On the beach below, Abbacchio works to rewind time 15 years to identify the identity of a certain photographer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: Get to the Collessium in Rome!
programme.desc: With Abbacchio's replaying ability interminably stamped in stone, Bruno and team analyze the cryptic face and fingerprints left behind when a mysterious call arrives. They must race to the Colosseum, the caller warns, if they hope to ever defeat the Boss.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: No sooner than Bruno and team set foot on the shore near Rome the team finds a flesh-eating mold devouring everyone in sight. It's the work of Cioccolata, made worse by his partner Secco, who records the tortured faces of his victims to be viewed later.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Branching off from Bruno, who opts to tackle the underground swimmer Secco, Giorno and Mista chase Cioccolata as he flies to spread rotten ruin upon Rome. Their battles unfold in front of a mystery ally silently awaiting their arrival at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: One fierce battle ends in Cioccolata's defeat, but another unfolds after Secco listens to Cioccolata's revealing final voicemail. Bucciarati sinks into an intense underground struggle to stop Secco from reaching the secret stationed at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he's not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Key to defeating the Boss in hand, Polnareff waits for Bucciarati and crew. But the one who appears before him first is none other than the Boss of the Passione himself, Diavolo. The tides may not be the only things shifting in the battle yet to come.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Pierced by the arrow, Silver Chariot transforms into Chariot Requiem, its new power swapping the souls of all living creatures nearby. Realizing the dangers of the arrow in the wrong hands, Giorno and crew scramble to get ahold of it before Diavolo does.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Grotesque disfigurations begin to emerge from the soul-swapped bodies as Chariot Requiem's frenzy rages on. Bucciarati and crew need to take back the arrow, and fast. However, Giorno has a terrifying revelation, stopping everyone in their tracks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Solving the mystery of Requiem, Diavolo takes control of Trish's soul and steals the arrow. Attacks do nothing against Emperor Crimson's time leaps and Eulogy's predictions. But just as Diavolo is about to pierce his own Stand with the arrow...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Righteous actions born of truth shall never be destroyed. Piercing Golden Wind with the arrow, Giorno draws the final battle against Diavolo to a close. And Diavolo, robbed of the mercy of death, spirals violently into an “end” that never ends.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?

programme.title: Milking the World's Most Venomous Spider!
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to milk the world's most venomous spider in a high-stakes episode filled with fangs, silk, and scientific precision.With panda-like fuzz and a sting that ranks among the worst, this ant is no pushover. Mark explains what makes the panda ant so formidable.

programme.title: Deadly Snake Milking Gone Wrong!
programme.desc: Things go south during a venom extraction. Coyote experiences the dangers firsthand in this episode where snake milking takes a scary turn.

programme.title: Mantis Shrimp Punch Test!
programme.desc: The mantis shrimp packs the fastest punch in nature. Coyote shows how its explosive strike can shatter shells—and maybe more.Maggots vs feet? Coyote steps into 300,000 larvae to demonstrate their bizarre biological purpose and what happens when they swarm.

programme.title: Scariest Pig on the Planet! (Bearded Pig of Borneo)
programme.desc: In Borneo, Mark encounters the bearded pig, a wild and intimidating animal with a face only a mother could love—plus tusks to match.Mark tracks down and is stung by a mammoth wasp—a rare species with a sting that ranks high on the pain scale.

programme.title: Bitten by the Black Flame Centipede! (Instant Regret)
programme.desc: The black flame centipede doesn't disappoint. Mark is bitten and nearly instantly regrets it in this creepy crawler showcase.Mark finds the bizarre ‘murder leaf,' a mysterious plant rumored to harm creatures on contact. Is the myth real? He investigates firsthand.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!
programme.desc: The largest ant in the world? Mark puts its jaws to the test in an unforgettable, up-close bite challenge.Face-to-face with a killer hornet, Mark accepts another sting challenge to educate viewers about hornet defense and behavior.

programme.title: Stung by a Big Blue Bee!
programme.desc: A massive, electric-blue bee with a sting to match! Mark tests its painful jab while exploring its striking coloration and behavior.Meet the assassin bug: nature's silent killer. Mark gets bitten and shows how this bug dispatches prey with surgical precision.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.

programme.title: 5 Deadly Tick Bites You Need to Worry About!
programme.desc: A deep dive into the five most dangerous tick bites—what to look for, how to avoid them, and why they're more threatening than they seem.A fierce jungle standoff unfolds as a jaguar faces off with a caiman. Coyote breaks down the tactics, strength, and outcomes of this epic duel.

programme.title: I Caught a 300lb River Monster!
programme.desc: A legendary catch! Coyote reels in a 300-pound river monster and showcases the sheer strength and survival of this freshwater beast.This slime isn't alien—it's animal. But which one made it? Coyote follows the trail to uncover a gooey mystery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control-life in Berry Bitty City is impossible!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: To Where And Back Again Part 1
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer assembles an unlikely team of heroes to defend Equestria.

programme.title: My Little Pony

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: Pinkie Pie: Hyper Helper Part 1 / Pinkie Pie: Hyper Helper Part 2
programme.desc: Pinkie Pie prepares for the final round of the Royal Jelly Juggernaut. / Pinkie Pie enters the final round.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: To Where And Back Again Part 2
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer leads an unlikely squad of rescuers against one of the ponies' oldest and greatest foes.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle agonizes over Starlight Glimmer's future and seeks advice from Princess Celestia.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer and Trixie accidentally make the Cutie Map disappear.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle agrees to babysit her niece Flurry Heart despite already having a very busy schedule.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Maud Pie considers moving to Ponyville after graduating from geology school.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Paradise opens the door to the Land of the Legends bringing some trouble.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Megan helps the legends from her storybooks to get them back where they belong.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: The Stratodons try to steal away Little Ponies.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Megan and his Little Ponies go to Midnight Castle.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: The Quest Of Princess Ponies Pt.1
programme.desc: Spike and the Bushwoolies discover the Royal Paradise.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: The Quest Of Princess Ponies Pt.2
programme.desc: All the magic in Ponyland has gone crazy. Will Megan and Princess Tiffany be able to save the day?

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: To Where And Back Again Part 2
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer leads an unlikely squad of rescuers against one of the ponies' oldest and greatest foes.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle agonizes over Starlight Glimmer's future and seeks advice from Princess Celestia.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Starlight Glimmer and Trixie accidentally make the Cutie Map disappear.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Seize the Wind!
programme.desc: Playmaker continues his duel with the Knight of Hanoi using the new Speed Duel rules. Playmaker is backed into a corner by the Knight's Cracking Dragon, but a data storm soon envelopes the field and Playmaker activates his Skill.

programme.title: Blippi's Summer Games
programme.desc: Blippi is back with Blippi's Sports Summer Games Movie For Kids!

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - Spindly Tam Kanushu / Science Fair: Betty's old martial arts trainer, Spindly Tam Kanushu, is captured by Maximus, who wants him to train his Morbidian Blood Monks in the martial arts./Betty and her classmates participate in a science fair at school, while in space, Maximus attacks the water planet Aquus, and tries to capture the sea creature inhabitants for use as a discount canned pet food he hopes will take the universe by storm.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - The Attack of the Evil Baby: Betty's fearful trip to the dentist to deal with a cavity is interrupted when she is called off to save the galaxy from the evil alien baby Infantor, who is draining magma from planets to mold to create action figures/ Sparky is chosen to compete in a new "Fear Factor" style game show, but something is not right. Maximus is behind the game show, and is rigging it so that Sparky wins! On Earth, Betty tries to stop her parents from selling her sci-fi posters and books at a yard sale.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - The Tortoise and the Heiress: The Rangers save a tortoise from off-road vehicles. / The Rangers save peatland from fires.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - The Otter and the Oil: The Rangers have to save an otter from an oil tanker leak, then plug and clean the leak. The Rangers save a pod of orcas.

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Cave Pig & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Cave Pig", "Joy to the Pigs" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Chuckmania & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Chuckmania", "Not without my helmet" and more!

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Crimes R Us / Life's Ruff: King Koopa busts out a top criminal so he can teach the Koopalings to steal and to stop the Mario Brothers. / Hip and Hop Koopa turn Luigi and King Whim-bag, of the ice world, into dogs with the king's wand.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Up, up and a Koopa: Kooky uses his new "Raiser Upper" machine to levitate everything in the Mushroom Kingdom to the sky. / Another set of adventures starring the now-classic kids' heroes, The Super Marios Bros. This time Koopa has escaped from a Banishment Zone to battle the Super Mario Bros. And he has a powerful new weapon, the Koopa Kids - Koopa's bratty, yet lovable.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The First Day of School: Arnold Armstrong, formerly the superhero Captain Fantastic, faces an unexpected career change after losing his superpowers in a final epic showdown with Dr. Superior he's now tasked with guiding a special group of 6 kids through superhero training and the challenges of kindergarten.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Art of the Steal: A fieldtrip to the Greenville Museum of Art is interrupted by a critical mission: work as a team to save the museum's most precious painting from two clever art thieves.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - That Smarts!: In the absence of Sir C, Pacopolis needs a new genius, especially after Buttocks hacks Sir C's computer and builds a giant indestructible robot based on Grinder's design.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Pac-Mania: Pac's enjoying being a teen idol-like celebrity, until a TV-show based on him, Cyli and Spiral makes them look like fools.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Split: The Skylanders realize there's only one way to cure Dark Spyro of his evil.

programme.desc: The Zeo Rangers discover that Tommy has been captured by Prince Gasket.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Gold Ranger is forced to defend himself when the brainwashed Tommy attacks him.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Everyone is stunned when it is revealed that Billy has aged into an old man.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers learn how different cultures celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason, who is continuing to lose the golden powers, is confronted by Rita and Lord Zedd.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Darkonda sets a trap for the Red Ranger, Andros finally comes face to face with his long-lost sister.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Astronema questions her own motives as she travels to KO-35 to battle the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers question whether they can trust Astronema when she offers to help them find Zordon.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers race to save the Earth from an asteroid on a collision course with the planet.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: An old ally returns to help Andros rescue his sister from Dark Specter

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Divatox returns to Earth seeking vengeance against the Power Rangers Turbo.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Turbo Rangers race to stop Divatox from destroying the Angel Grove power plant.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zordon and Alpha 5 bid farewell to the planet Earth as Divatox escalates her assault on Angel Grove.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears

programme.title: Everything's Changed
programme.desc: The dream chaser's jobs are on the line now that the dream world is under the guardianship of a mysterious new hero called “Dreamsmasher.”

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.
